summary: Route PMCC timesheet approvals by submitter department so design-side submitters do not enter cost-side approval nodes.

notes: PM_DESIGN + PMCC and PM-family + PMCC timesheets route as PM-side approvals.
CC + PMCC timesheets continue to route through the PMCC cross-department chain.
Existing running PM_DESIGN + PMCC approval instances are repaired from the PMCC template to the PM template.
No frontend behavior change is required; the approval center reads the corrected approval-chain data from the database.

verification: Run scripts/assert-timesheet-submitter-org-routing.sql before migration to confirm the red case.
Apply migration 102 and insert schema_migrations version 102.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.2.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
